title: corylus avellana
intro: Corylus avellana, also known as the common hazel tree or European hazel, is a deciduous tree species native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Corylus avellana lie in its rich content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of consuming Corylus avellana include improved cardiovascular health, reduced risk of chronic diseases, and enhanced cognitive function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements and teas. Herbal preparations of Corylus avellana include hazelnut oil, which is used in skincare and haircare products, and hazelnut tea, which is brewed from the leaves and used to aid digestion and reduce stress.
